ocr_text.text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive.

La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes

This product may not be right for you. Always read and follow the label.
Ce produit peut ne pas vous convenir. Toujours lire l'étiquette et suivre le mode d'emploi.

step_2_brand_detection_pass1.overall_description: The image shows a ZONNIC Mint nicotine pouch tin centered on a minty green gradient background with mist and mint leaves. The ZONNIC logo is printed on the product tin, with a gradient green halo behind the C. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, and the overall palette matches the Green/Mint flavour.

step_2b_formatted_detection_sent_to_pass:
OVERVIEW: The image shows a ZONNIC Mint nicotine pouch tin centered on a minty green gradient background with mist and mint leaves. The ZONNIC logo is printed on the product tin, with a gradient green halo behind the C. Regulatory warnings are prominent at the top and bottom, and the overall palette matches the Green/Mint flavour.
CONTENT TYPE: flavour_led

── LOGO ──
  Present: YES
  Position: center (on product tin/can)
  Text colour: navy blue
  Distorted or modified: NO
  Clear space sufficient: YES
  Relative size: large (dominates center of image)

── C HALO (CRITICAL) ──
  Any halo present: YES
  Halo on Z (leftmost letter): NO (correct)
  Halo on C (rightmost letter): YES (correct)
  Halo on other letters: none
  Halo colour: gradient from dark green (#007e47) to light green (#b7da9b)
  Halo is gradient (two colours): YES
  Gradient colours: dark green (#007e47) to light green (#b7da9b)
  Shape: circle
  Proportional: YES
  Has outline: NO

── BACKGROUND ──
  Type: gradient
  Colours: mint green, teal, white
  Gradient direction: top left to bottom right
  Description: Soft minty gradient with mint leaves and white mist/fog effect

── REGULATORY ELEMENTS ──
  Nicotine warning: PRESENT
    Position: top (large block), also on product tin
    Text: WARNING: This product contains nicotine. Nicotine is highly addictive. Only to be used by adults who are trying to quit smoking. AVERTISSEMENT : Ce produit contient de la nicotine. La nicotine crée une forte dépendance. À utiliser uniquement par des adultes qui désirent cesser de fumer.
    Bilingual: YES
  18+ age icon: NOT PRESENT ⚠
  Risk communication: PRESENT
    Position: bottom (small text block)

── TYPOGRAPHY ──
  Fonts: Bold sans-serif (logo), regular sans-serif (regulatory and product text)
  Sans-serif: YES
  Additional text: 24 Nicotine Pouches / Sachets de nicotine, MINT / MENTHE, 4 MG, Nicotine Replacement Therapy, product warnings

── COLOURS ──
  Dominant: navy blue, mint green, teal, white
  Flavour palette match: Green/Mint
  Secondary colour usage: Used as accent and background gradient

step_3_rule_evaluation_pass2.summary: The image features a ZONNIC Mint nicotine pouch tin centered on a minty green gradient background, with the ZONNIC logo in bold navy blue and a gradient green halo correctly placed around the C. The logo is clear, undistorted, and uses the proper flavour palette. Regulatory warnings are clearly displayed at the top and bottom, and all text is in a clean sans-serif font. However, the 18+ age restriction icon is missing, which is a critical regulatory requirement for all marketing assets. All other brand elements, including the logo, halo, colours, and regulatory text, are correctly applied and visually consistent with guidelines. To achieve full compliance, the image must include the 18+ icon at the bottom alongside the risk communication text.

checks_performed.detail: Nicotine warning statement is present at the top in both English and French, meeting regulatory requirements.
18+ age restriction icon is not visible anywhere in the image.
Risk communication text is present at the bottom of the image in both English and French.
ZONNIC logo is clearly visible on the product tin in the center of the image.
Logo text is navy blue, which is correct for the minty gradient background.
C halo is present, circular, gradient, and sized proportionally. No halo on other letters.
Logo is unmodified, with no gradients in text, outlines, distortion, or stacking.
Background is a minty green gradient, appropriate for flavour-led content.
Gradient flows top left to bottom right, with proper colour balance and logo placement.
Content is flavour-led and uses the correct gradient background.
All colours match the approved Green/Mint flavour palette.
All text uses bold and regular sans-serif fonts consistent with Santral.
No grey gradient background is used; this check does not apply.
Logo has sufficient clear space around it, with no elements intruding.
Halo does not blend into the background, flavour matches, and logo is not placed in any shape overlay.

violations.rule_text: The 18+ icon must be present on marketing materials to indicate age restriction.
violations.issue: The 18+ age restriction icon is missing from the image, which is required for all marketing assets.
violations.fix_suggestion: Add the circular 18+ icon at the bottom of the image, ideally next to the risk communication text.
violations.evidence: No 18+ icon detected anywhere in the image.
